CC CLI install on GitHub Actions — broken vs. fixed

Why every claude invocation in cc-triage fast-failed in run 25443026871, and what the fix changes. Toggle to see each install command's outcome.

Install command


    
    
  
    
  
    
    
    What claude -p sees
    
    
    
    
      
  
      

      


      
  
      Workflow inventory 5 files use claude-code
      
  
      
    
      Workflow--ignore-scriptsinstall.cjsBeforeAfter
      
    
      
      claude-release-watch.ymlyesaddedparse_failed cascadeextracts features
      
      
      claude-health.ymlyesaddedclaude -p 1runs assessment
      
      
      orchestkit-eval.ymlyesaddedeval -p --bare 1eval runs
      
      
      plugin-validation.ymlyesaddedsilently skippedvalidates
      
      
      ultrareview.ymlnon/aalready correctunchanged
      
          
  
      

      


      
  
      Why this fix is safe
      
  
        
    
      • + Re-running install.cjs is the package's own postinstall script — same code, same trust boundary.
        • 
    
      • + --ignore-scripts stays on, so transitive postinstalls from other deps remain blocked (Scorecard #130, #132).
        • 
    
      • i The error message itself instructs this exact path: node node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-code/install.cjs.
        • 
    
      • + A regression test (tests/integration/test-cc-cli-install-pattern.sh) fails if a workflow drops the install.cjs line.
        • 
  
      

      


      
  See run 25443026871 · PR #1620 had snapshots through 2.1.131 with parse_failed=true on all 3 — fixed by this change + a fresh cron dispatch.
